equipmentMods.belt: Burning Shield: Burning shield becomes a legendary fire shield, increasing its size by 10% and damage by 30% and grants a Blessing that gives 1% Fire Damage and 1% Armor, stacks up to 75.

equipmentMods.goblet: Delusion of Zelkors: Mages are no longer illusions and remain on the battlefield for an additional 0.5 seconds.
equipmentMods.helmet: Killing a monster or hitting an elite/boss has a 10% to trigger a Bloodlust effect, gain 5% crit damage, 2% armor and 0.35% movement speed per stack. Stacks up to 100, lasts 15 seconds.
equipmentMods.horn: Delusion of Zelkors: Spawn two additional mages.
equipmentMods.trinket: Delusion of Zelkors: Mages' explosions now spawn fire spikes, dealing an additional 20% damage for every active mage.

equipmentMods.trinket: Chain Lightning: When a link connects, it also strikes the target with a lightning bolt from the sky that deals the same damage as Chain Lightning.

equipmentMods.amulet: Gain 2% Physical Damage per Bloodlust stack
